title: Warm Garlicky Slovakian Puff Pastry Flatbread
description: A garlicky, springy, adventurous Slovakian dish featuring plain chocolate and lamination-puff pastry, cooked on a comal to ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly perfection
instructions: Preheat the comal over medium heat
Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of about 1/4 inch
Spread the minced garlic evenly over the pastry, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges
Sprinkle the broken chocolate pieces over the garlic
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling to form a crust
Brush the crust with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper
Place the pastry on the preheated comal and cook for 5 minutes on each side
Remove the pastry from the comal and let it cool for a few minutes
Serve the flatbread warm, garnished with a sprinkle of salt and a drizzle of olive oil
